tluaRepeatUntilErrors.tlua(10,10): error TS2391: Function implementation is missing or not immediately following the declaration.
tluaRepeatUntilErrors.tlua(11,3): error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
tluaRepeatUntilErrors.tlua(13,1): error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
tluaRepeatUntilErrors.tlua(22,9): error TS1345: An expression of type 'void' cannot be tested for truthiness.


==== tluaRepeatUntilErrors.tlua (5 errors) ====
    // Missing `until`.
    function missingUntil(): number
      repeat
        local n = 1;
        n;
      return 0;
    end
    ~~~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
    
    // `until` outside a repeat.
    function strayUntil(): number
             ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2391: Function implementation is missing or not immediately following the declaration.
      until true;
      ~~~~~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
      return 0;
    end
    ~~~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
    
    // A void condition cannot be tested.
    declare function nothing(): void;
    
    function voidCondition(): number
      repeat
        local n = 1;
        n;
      until nothing();
            ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1345: An expression of type 'void' cannot be tested for truthiness.
      return 0;
    end
